how_it_works.title: How MLILA Works
how_it_works.description: A seamless flow designed to get your vehicle back on the road in record time.

step1.title: Request a Part
step1.desc: Submit the exact details of the spare part you need, including vehicle brand, year, and photos of the broken piece.

step2.title: Receive Quotes
step2.desc: Verified Sellers across the network receive your request immediately and respond with competitive quotes (New or Used).

step3.title: Accept & Connect
step3.desc: Select the best quote based on price and warranty. Connect directly with the seller via Native Call or WhatsApp to finalize.
